comment.text: This key displays the number of available backups to the user. It appears as a header within a backup card section on the Backup Page, indicating the available backups for SaaS payments. The text will change to a different message if the user has a free tariff and backup service is disabled.

usage.context:
{isFreeTariff && !isBackupServiceOn ? t("Services:PaidBackupDisabled") : t("Payments:AvailableBackups")}
